colors.secondary_button: bg-white border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-900 transition-colors

grid.table_wrapper: overflow-x-auto border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg bg-white shadow-sm

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between
header.nav_links: flex items-center gap-6 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-600

time_entry_table.th: sticky top-0 bg-zinc-50 border-b border-zinc-200 px-3 py-3 font-semibold text-zinc-700 whitespace-nowrap
time_entry_table.frozen_column: sticky left-0 z-10 bg-white border-r border-zinc-200 font-medium px-4 py-3 min-w-[200px] shadow-[2px_0_5px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
time_entry_table.input_cell: w-full h-full min-h-[44px] px-3 py-2 text-center text-zinc-900 bg-transparent border-none focus:bg-zinc-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-inset focus:ring-zinc-900 outline-none transition-all tabular-nums

kpi_card.wrapper: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg p-5 flex flex-col gap-1 shadow-sm
kpi_card.label: text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle background shifts (zinc-50) and border darken (zinc-300).
interactions_and_motion.focus: All interactive elements must use the bold focus ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-900.
interactions_and_motion.keyboard: Implement Enter to jump down, Tab to jump right. Inputs should auto-select text on focus to allow rapid overriding.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.

icons.usage: Use regular or bold weights for a technical, crisp look. Avoid duotone for this dense utility app.

media.strategy: No images. This is a highly dense, data-focused productivity application. Empty states should use clean typography and subtle Phosphor icons.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA against background. Zinc-500 on Zinc-50 is the lightest allowed text.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All inputs MUST have data-testid. Example: data-testid='input-monday-proj1', data-testid='btn-save-week'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include 'outfit' and 'ibm-plex' in fontFamily.
Implement the 4 main screens (Indtast timer, Mine aktiviteter, Programoverblik, Administration).
The primary screen (Indtast timer) must feature a dense, spreadsheet-like table. The first column (Project + Activity) must be sticky left.
Time inputs must be highly keyboard accessible. Implement logic so Tab moves right and Shift+Tab moves left. Enter could move down or act as a save trigger.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards for the main table; write custom HTML table structure to ensure perfect dense cell alignment and frozen columns.
Keep styling brutally minimal and functional (Nordic Ledger style). No gradients, no rounded inner cells.
